channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-06-15 23:48 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Lmao. And there’s the plan. Right there. Laid bare in your face. Create the problem (stranger danger...
item.description: Lmao. And there’s the plan. Right there. Laid bare in your face. Create the problem (stranger danger), sell the solution (more authoritative surveillance state), repeat forever. Everyone owes conspiracy theorists an apology who have been screaming about this for years.

item.title: @elonmusk: The scale of what is to come has no precedent
item.description: The scale of what is to come has no precedent

item.title: @elonmusk: Rockets and spaceships taking us to stars is an inspiring future
item.description: Rockets and spaceships taking us to stars is an inspiring future

item.title: @elonmusk: This is nuts
item.description: This is nuts

item.title: @elonmusk: Btw even China and Iran don’t do this. Only North Korea does this.
item.description: Btw even China and Iran don’t do this. Only North Korea does this.

item.title: @elonmusk: Building cars in America drives innovation and fuels domestic supply chains. In Fremont, California,...
item.description: Building cars in America drives innovation and fuels domestic supply chains. In Fremont, California, Ambassador Greer toured@Tesla’s manufacturing hub for Model 3, Model Y, and advanced robotics, which rolls out hundreds of thousands of American-made vehicles and supports tens of thousands of jobs.

item.title: @elonmusk: TESLA 🤝 AMERICAN-MADE Tesla vehicles are the most American-made by parts produced and sourced in the...
item.description: TESLA 🤝 AMERICAN-MADE Tesla vehicles are the most American-made by parts produced and sourced in the USA. 🇺🇸

item.title: @elonmusk: After 30 days docked to the@Space_Station, the Dragon spacecraft supporting SpaceX’s 34th Commercial...
item.description: After 30 days docked to the@Space_Station, the Dragon spacecraft supporting SpaceX’s 34th Commercial Resupply Services mission for@NASAwill undock from the orbiting lab on Tuesday, June 16 →spacex.com/launches/crs34

item.title: @elonmusk: The freakout by those on the Left subsidized by taxpayer funds over OMB’s update of the regulation g...
item.description: The freakout by those on the Left subsidized by taxpayer funds over OMB’s update of the regulation governing federal grant making tells you how important it is to keep the bureaucracies from leaking out spending that is woke, wasteful, and contra to the policies of the Trump Administration thru the NGOs.afj.org/article/federal-fund…

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: Starlink has now partnered with 41 airlines worldwide, covering more than 7,000 aircraft u...
item.description: BREAKING: Starlink has now partnered with 41 airlines worldwide, covering more than 7,000 aircraft under installation or contract.

item.title: @elonmusk: This is the best general article that I’ve read on the topic of SpaceX.
item.description: This is the best general article that I’ve read on the topic of SpaceX.

item.title: @elonmusk: JUST IN: Tesla Robotaxi has recorded zero at-fault incidents since February, according to newly rele...
item.description: JUST IN: Tesla Robotaxi has recorded zero at-fault incidents since February, according to newly released NHTSA data.

item.title: @elonmusk: Not sure who needs to hear this but your Tesla can parallel park for you
item.description: Not sure who needs to hear this but your Tesla can parallel park for you

item.title: @elonmusk: Aged like wine 🍷
item.description: Aged like wine 🍷

item.title: @elonmusk: They always use defensible excuses for the indefensible
item.description: They always use defensible excuses for the indefensible

item.title: @elonmusk: Das ZDF hat reagiert, in der Beschreibung der Sendung steht nun, die Formulierung zu Beginn (Musk ha...
item.description: Das ZDF hat reagiert, in der Beschreibung der Sendung steht nun, die Formulierung zu Beginn (Musk habe zur Jagd auf Migranten aufgerufen) sei "unpräzise und deshalb missverständlich". Immer diese Missverständnisse, kennt man ja noch von Charlie Kirk

item.title: @elonmusk: Make our Sun sentient to understand the Universe and extend the light of consciousness to the stars
item.description: Make our Sun sentient to understand the Universe and extend the light of consciousness to the stars
